verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I would like to tell you what I think of Jesus, Since I've found Him, a friend so kind & true; I'd love to tell you how He's changed my life completely, He did something that nobody else could ever do.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No one ever cared for me like Jesus, And there's no other friend so kind as He; No one else could take my sins and darkness from me, Oh, how much He cared for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My life was filled with sin when Jesus found me, This heart of mine was filled with shame and woes; But the Master placed His strong arms around me, And He led me in the way I ought to go.
